title: 400 Grams Elastic Rubber Bands, Bag Sturdy Thick & Stretchable Colored Bands, Natural Elastic Bands for School Home Office Supplies Industrial Crafts DIY Everyday Use 38mm
features: High Quality Rubber Bands--Made of high-quality natural rubber with strong elasticity, stretchable, sturdy, long-lasting and reusable.
Durable And Strong--These strong elastic assorted rubberbands help organizing and keeping items together around the house, office or classroom.

Great for Organizing--Good to bundle letters, money, Paper, Bills, organize small kitchen items, computer cords, keep headphone cables tidy and other DIY art crafts. These rubber bands are also great for tie dye projects.
Wide Application--Rubber bands are designed for daily use and industrial applications. It is great for home, office, bank and school use.
Rubber Bands--400 grams bag assorted colours and 100 pcs in total, The Rubber Band is 38mm in diameter, 1.5mm in width.
